cards.fr: J'espère que tu te rétablis vite
cards.note: Rétablis is more commonly used than remettras in this context

cards.fr: Ne me fais pas porter le chapeau !
cards.note: Idiomatic expression meaning to take responsibility for something, often unfairly
Used to apologize or ask for forgiveness, informal

cards.en: Where did you get that from?
cards.note: Use 'cela' for a more formal tone, or omit it in informal conversations
